subcodes.first_line: O ye faithful ones, O ye sincere ones! 'Abdu'l-Bahá communes with his Lord in the depths of night and supplicates unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المومنون ایها المخلصون ان عبدالبهاء یناجی ربه فی جنح اللیالی و یدعوه
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
